name: strong-frontend-match
description: Senior React engineer resume vs a senior frontend role — should score high.
resume: Jane Doe — Senior Frontend Engineer. 7 years building production React + TypeScript single-page apps. Led a team of 4 migrating a legacy Angular dashboard to React, cut bundle size 40%. Deep experience with Next.js, Redux, React Query, Tailwind, Jest/Playwright testing, and CI/CD on Vercel. Mentored junior engineers, owned the design-system component library.

job.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
job.full_description: We are hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead development of our customer-facing React/TypeScript application. You will own complex UI features, drive our component library, mentor junior engineers, and partner with design. Requirements: 5+ years React, strong TypeScript, experience with Next.js, state management, and automated testing. Nice to have: design systems, performance optimization.
